landing.heroTitle: Yield-bearing, fiat-native digital inheritance on Stellar.
landing.heroSubtitle: InheritX helps you secure yield-earning inheritance plans with mass payouts and direct local fiat off-ramping to bank accounts or mobile money via Stellar anchors.
landing.aboutBody1: InheritX simplifies digital wealth transfer by introducing yield-generating inheritance plans with multi-beneficiary allocations. Your locked assets accrue interest continuously, maximizing the value passed to your heirs.
landing.aboutBody2: Through integrated Stellar Anchors, your heirs receive payouts directly in their local fiat bank accounts or mobile money wallets, bypassing any Web3 complexity.
landing.step1Desc: Fund Your Plan and Opt-In to Earn Continuous Yield.
landing.step2Desc: Add Multiple Beneficiaries and Setup Allocation Splits.
landing.step3Desc: Receive directly in local fiat cash via Stellar Anchors.
landing.whyWorks1: Starts with purpose — "Helping your legacy reach the people who matter" sets an emotional tone
landing.whyWorks2: One short paragraph — easy to skim.
landing.whyWorks3: Metaphor tie-in — connects to your tree concept in a natural way.
landing.benefitsSubtitle: Here's why you should choose us
landing.benefitsBody1: InheritX helps you plan and allocate your digital wealth with maximum yield generation, ensuring your capital grows until the moment of transfer.
landing.benefitsBody2: Distribute to any number of heirs via customizable percentage splits, and settle automatically in local fiat cash straight to their local bank accounts using Stellar anchors.
landing.benefit1Desc: Assets earn yield continuously in the background, maximizing value for heirs.
landing.benefit2Desc: Configure allocations for multiple beneficiaries to split assets smoothly.
landing.benefit3Desc: Settlement via Stellar Anchors directly to bank accounts and mobile money.
landing.benefit4Desc: Smart contract handles trigger conditions dynamically without third parties.

admin.mockDataWarning: Backend unavailable — showing mock data derived from local user records.
admin.userManagementDesc: Manage users, KYC approvals, and active plans.
